items.question: Should production mode create/update work-tracking system and external documentation system directly or remain copy-ready only?
items.resolution: Copy-ready documents only; analyst publishes manually.

items.question: What exact retention duration and deletion owner apply to minimum run evidence and personal sign-off data?
items.resolution: Temporary run evidence and personal sign-off working data are deleted after process completion; the final generated package is retained as the durable output.

items.question: Should the playbook define default approver sets per data mode, or must Product/PO always define the complete approver list per event?
items.resolution: Combined model: the playbook proposes a minimum role set by data mode; Product/PO confirms or changes it. The model cannot approve.

items.question: Should cancelled runs be resumable indefinitely or expire?
items.resolution: Cancelled runs are terminal and non-resumable.

items.question: Which exact sanctioned runtime adapter/profile will execute this playbook in production?
Does the required work-tracking system URL refer to the Workflow Preparation work-tracking system entity, the implementation work-tracking system task, or must both be captured?
items.resolution: Only the Workflow Preparation work-tracking system URL is mandatory. Implementation work-tracking system URL is optional downstream metadata.

items.question: Who provides the formal draft-content approval before manual publication: analyst only, Product/PO, or the full sign-off set?
items.resolution: The analyst explicitly approves the downloaded draft before external publication.

items.question: Should the final linked package store only external URLs, or also immutable external page/task revision identifiers and timestamps?
items.resolution: Store only external process record URL and work-tracking record URL.

items.question: What URL validation rules and allowed external documentation system/work-tracking system host domains apply in production?
items.resolution: No host/domain or remote-access validation is enforced.

items.question: After external links are synchronized, must the analyst approve the regenerated linked package once more before handoff?
items.resolution: No second explicit approval after link synchronization; deterministic checks are sufficient.
